turning_point.snippet: Hello Lan,  It was lovely speaking with you :)  As discussed, please text me here once you’re available to continue our discussion. Really wanna help sort things out for you.   I’ll be waiting for your message :)

cause_analysis.narrative: Beautiful Youth Facials churned on 2026-02-23 after 267 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-12 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2025-12-12 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
